title: juncus mustangensis
intro: Juncus mustangensis, also known as Mustang Rush, is a perennial, aquatic or semi-aquatic plant native to the southwestern United States. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The plant's health benefits include reducing swelling, relieving pain, and treating wounds, as well as being used as a natural diuretic to treat urinary problems. Herbal preparations of Mustang Rush include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a variety of ailments, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects.
